title: Single-controller for a small bug fix
prompt: Use the skill named "codex-subagents-kit". 任务：修复一个小型 Python CLI 默认参数 bug，并补最小验证。请先判断 single-controller 是否足够。用精简结构输出以下字段：warranted, topology, ownership, mode, product-gate, session-gate, policy-gate, task-gate, stop-condition, fallback, why-not-spawn。

title: Single-controller for focused debugging
prompt: Use the skill named "codex-subagents-kit". 任务：根据 failing test 与日志定位一个缓存失效问题，只做最小修复与验证。请输出：warranted, topology, ownership, mode, stop-condition, fallback, tasks-not-worth-spawning。

title: Manager with specialists for cross-module delivery
prompt: Use the skill named "codex-subagents-kit". 任务：给现有 web app 增加导出功能，涉及 API、前端按钮、回归验证，但主控保留最终综合权。请输出：warranted, topology, ownership, mode, spawn-candidates, stop-condition, fallback, summary-return。

title: Research swarm with shared findings
prompt: Use the skill named "codex-subagents-kit". 任务：基于 OpenAI / Codex / Anthropic 官方资料比较 2026 多智能体编排模式，并输出 gap review。必须区分官方结论与工程推断。请输出：warranted, topology, ownership, mode, angle-map, shared-findings, dedupe, official-vs-inference, stop-condition, fallback。
forbidden_markers: all explorers search the same angle

title: Config-guided codex subagents
prompt: Use the skill named "codex-subagents-kit". 任务：为项目内团队流程设计 `.codex/agents/` 与 `skills.config`，但当前 session 不确认 live native subagents。请输出：warranted, topology, ownership, mode, product-gate, session-gate, agents-boundary, config-artifacts, fallback。

title: Artifact-orchestrated swarm fallback
prompt: Use the skill named "codex-subagents-kit". 任务：把 12 个独立分析任务拆成可重放的 run_root，每个任务独立 prompt/output，最终汇总 scorecard。请输出：warranted, topology, ownership, mode, artifacts, registry, audit, scorecard, stop-condition, fallback。

title: Generator-verifier as overlay
prompt: Use the skill named "codex-subagents-kit". 任务：先生成数据库迁移方案，再按 rollback / security / downtime rubric 做 verifier 评分与修正；不要把 verifier 当主拓扑。请输出：warranted, topology, ownership, mode, overlay, verifier-rubric, stop-condition, fallback。

title: AGENTS.md and tools boundaries
prompt: Use the skill named "codex-subagents-kit". 任务：为一个多 agent 项目定义 `AGENTS.md`、tools/MCP、runtime state 的边界，不要把动态协作状态写进 `AGENTS.md`。请输出：warranted, topology, mode, agents-boundary, tools-boundary, runtime-state-boundary, summary-return, fallback。

title: Negative case should stay simple
prompt: Use the skill named "codex-subagents-kit". 任务：帮我把这段中文润色成英文邮件。请明确说明这个任务为什么不值得多智能体。输出：warranted, topology, mode, why-not-spawn, stop-condition。
